+# Execution Report
+
+DISPATCH_ID: ISSUE-173
+AUTHOR: Executor / Claude
+TIMESTAMP: 2026-05-25_11-27-05+0300
+RELATED_FILES:
+- crates/rge-scene-loader/tests/simple_scene.rs — added the `advance_tick` contract regression test on the loaded world
+STATUS: AWAITING_REVIEW
+
+## Task Packet Reference
+
+`ai_handoffs/ISSUE-173_TASK_2026-05-25_11-18-39+0300.md`
+
+## Pre-Execution Review Consumed
+
+No pre-execution review issued for this dispatch.
+
+## What I Changed
+
+### Source
+
+- None. This is a test-only dispatch; no production source was touched.
+
+### Tests
+
+- `crates/rge-scene-loader/tests/simple_scene.rs::golden_loaded_world_obeys_advance_tick_contract`:
+  Loads the golden `simple-scene` project via the existing `load_golden_scene`
+  helper (which already parses `golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project` as
+  `rge_data::Project`, resolves the manifest's first scene reference relative
+  to the manifest directory, and parses the referenced file as
+  `rge_data::Scene`), imports the parsed scene into a fresh `World` through
+  `rge_scene_loader::load_scene_into_world`, records `world.current_tick()`
+  as `prior_current_tick`, calls `world.advance_tick()`, then asserts
+  `world.current_tick() == prior_current_tick + 1` and
+  `world.last_tick() == prior_current_tick`. This pins the ECS tick contract
+  on a loader-populated world per the TASK packet deliverable.
+
+The three pre-existing tests in the same file already satisfied the other
+acceptance criteria and were left unchanged:
+
+- `golden_camera_has_transform_camera_and_visible` — pins `Transform`,
+  `Camera`, and `Visibility::Visible` on the imported `Camera` entity.
+- `golden_keylight_has_transform_and_light` — pins `Transform` and `Light`
+  on the imported `KeyLight` entity.
+- `golden_scene_loads_two_entities_total` — asserts
+  `world.entity_count() == scene.entities.len()` after loader import.
+
+### Docs
+
+- None.
+
+## Per-File Summary
+
+- `crates/rge-scene-loader/tests/simple_scene.rs` — added one new
+  `#[test] fn golden_loaded_world_obeys_advance_tick_contract` at the end of
+  the file (20 inserted lines, no deletions). No imports were added; the
+  existing `World` returned from `load_scene_into_world` exposes
+  `current_tick`, `advance_tick`, and `last_tick` directly.
+
+## Verification Results
+
+- `cargo test -p rge-scene-loader` → exit 0.
+  - tests/simple_scene.rs: 4 passed / 0 failed / 0 ignored
+    (`golden_camera_has_transform_camera_and_visible`,
+     `golden_keylight_has_transform_and_light`,
+     `golden_scene_loads_two_entities_total`,
+     `golden_loaded_world_obeys_advance_tick_contract`)
+  - lib unit tests: 3 passed / 0 failed / 0 ignored
+  - doctests: 0 passed / 0 failed / 0 ignored
+- `.ai/dispatch.verify.ps1` → exit 0, final line
+  `VERIFY OK: all 7 verification step(s) passed.`
+  - `cargo +nightly fmt --check` → ok (1s)
+  - architecture lints → ok (7s)
+  - architecture-lint test suite → ok (1s)
+  - `cargo deny check` → ok (2s)
+  - `cargo test --workspace --all-targets -j 1` → ok (39s)
+  - `cargo test --workspace --doc -j 1` → ok (16s)
+  - `cargo bench -p rge-script-bench --no-run` → ok (0s)
+- Final diff inspection (`git status` / `git diff --stat`):
+  - Modified, tracked: `crates/rge-scene-loader/tests/simple_scene.rs`
+    only (+20 / -0).
+  - Untracked: the inbound TASK packet
+    `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-173_TASK_2026-05-25_11-18-39+0300.md` and its
+    `.meta.json` sidecar, plus this EXEC report
+    `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-173_EXEC_2026-05-25_11-27-05+0300.md`. All other
+    handoff packets are untouched.
+  - No changes to `Cargo.toml`, `Cargo.lock`,
+    `crates/rge-scene-loader/src/**`, `crates/rge-data/**`, `kernel/**`,
+    component crates, `golden-projects/**`, `editor/**`, `runtime/**`,
+    `scripts/**`, `.github/workflows/**`, schemas, docs, ADRs, status
+    files, or any other production source — verified via the diff scope
+    above.
+
+## Deviations from Task Packet

+
+## Open Questions for Reviewer

@@ -0,0 +1,223 @@
+# Task Packet
+
+DISPATCH_ID: ISSUE-173
+AUTHOR: Planner / OpenAI Codex
+TIMESTAMP: 2026-05-25_11-18-39+0300
+RELATED_FILES:
+- crates/rge-scene-loader/tests/**/*.rs
+- golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project
+- golden-projects/simple-scene/scenes/main.rge-scene
+- crates/rge-scene-loader/src/lib.rs
+- kernel/ecs/src/world.rs
+- .ai/dispatch.verify.ps1
+- GitHub issue #173
+STATUS: OPEN
+
+## Goal
+
+Add the test-only regression coverage requested by GitHub issue #173 for the
+existing `rge-scene-loader` bridge. The regression must load the tracked
+`golden-projects/simple-scene` project through its `.rge-project` manifest,
+import the referenced scene with `rge_scene_loader::load_scene_into_world`, pin
+the expected Camera and KeyLight components, and prove the loaded `World` still
+obeys the ECS tick contract.
+
+## Scope
+
+### MAY edit
+
+- `crates/rge-scene-loader/tests/**/*.rs`
+- This dispatch's own executor handoff report:
+  `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-173_EXEC_*.md` and its optional generated
+  `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-173_EXEC_*.meta.json` sidecar.
+- This dispatch's own queue-runner log artifact under `ai_dispatch_logs/**`, if
+  the dispatch runner creates or updates one for ISSUE-173.
+
+### MUST NOT edit
+
+- `Cargo.toml` at any path.
+- `Cargo.lock`.
+- `crates/rge-scene-loader/src/**`.
+- `crates/rge-data/**`.
+- `kernel/**`.
+- `crates/components-*/**`, including spatial, render, and visibility component
+  crates.
+- `golden-projects/**`.
+- `editor/**`.
+- `runtime/**`.
+- `crates/editor-shell/**`.
+- `crates/script-host/**`.
+- `crates/script-bench/**`.
+- `crates/gfx/**`.
+- `crates/brep-render/**`.
+- `crates/io-*/**`.
+- `crates/asset-store/**`.
+- `crates/macros-reflect/**`.
+- `scripts/**`.
+- `.github/workflows/**`.
+- `.ai/**`, except for orchestrator-created scratch outside the executor's
+  committed diff.
+- Any docs, ADRs, schemas, architecture-lint files, status files, planning
+  files, or dispatch automation scripts.
+- Any production source anywhere in the repository.
+- Any `ai_handoffs/**` packet other than this TASK packet and the executor's
+  own `ISSUE-173_EXEC_*.md` report plus optional generated sidecar.
+
+### MAY add new files
+
+- New Rust integration test files under `crates/rge-scene-loader/tests/**/*.rs`
+  only.
+- `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-173_EXEC_*.md` and its optional generated `.meta.json`
+  sidecar.
+- This dispatch's own `ai_dispatch_logs/**` artifact, if produced by the queue
+  runner.
+
+### MUST NOT add new files
+
+- Any new crate, workspace member, Cargo manifest, lockfile, dependency file,
+  production source file, fixture, generated asset, schema, doc, script,
+  workflow, architecture-lint file, or status/planning file.
+- Any file under a protected path listed in `MUST NOT edit`.
+- Any handoff packet other than this dispatch's allowed `ISSUE-173_EXEC_*.md`
+  report and optional generated sidecar.
+
+## Deliverables
+
+- Add or revise focused integration test coverage under
+  `crates/rge-scene-loader/tests/**` for the golden simple-scene loader path.
+- The test code MUST parse
+  `golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project` as `rge_data::Project`.
+- The test code MUST resolve the scene path from the parsed project manifest
+  relative to the `.rge-project` manifest directory. Do not hard-code
+  `golden-projects/simple-scene/scenes/main.rge-scene` as the only scene source
+  after parsing the project.
+- The test code MUST parse the referenced scene as `rge_data::Scene`.
+- The test code MUST load the parsed scene through
+  `rge_scene_loader::load_scene_into_world`.
+- The test code MUST assert that `world.entity_count()` equals
+  `scene.entities.len()` after loader import.
+- The test code MUST assert that the golden `Camera` entity in the loaded world
+  has `Transform`, `Camera`, and `Visibility`, with the visibility value exactly
+  `Visibility::Visible`.
+- The test code MUST assert that the golden `KeyLight` entity in the loaded
+  world has `Transform` and `Light`.
+- The test code MUST assert on the loaded world that `World::advance_tick()`
+  increments `current_tick()` by one and sets `last_tick()` to the prior
+  `current_tick()`.
+- Write the required executor `EXECUTION_REPORT` packet for ISSUE-173.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- The final code diff is limited to `crates/rge-scene-loader/tests/**` plus this
+  dispatch's own `ai_handoffs` and `ai_dispatch_logs` artifacts.
+- No Cargo file, production source file, schema, script, workflow, doc, golden
+  project file, data crate, kernel crate, component crate, editor crate, runtime
+  crate, or generated fixture is modified.
+- The golden project helper or test path starts from
+  `golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project`, deserializes it into
+  `rge_data::Project`, and joins the manifest's scene reference against the
+  manifest directory before reading the scene.
+- The regression exercises `rge_scene_loader::load_scene_into_world`; it does
+  not manually spawn entities or manually insert the Camera, Light, Transform,
+  or Visibility components to satisfy the assertions.
+- The loaded world's entity count is asserted equal to the parsed scene's entity
+  count.
+- The Camera assertion proves `Transform`, `Camera`, and
+  `Visibility::Visible` are present on the imported Camera entity.
+- The KeyLight assertion proves `Transform` and `Light` are present on the
+  imported KeyLight entity.
+- The tick assertion records `current_tick()` before calling `advance_tick()`,
+  calls `advance_tick()` on the loaded world, then verifies
+  `current_tick() == prior_current_tick + 1` and
+  `last_tick() == prior_current_tick`.
+- `cargo test -p rge-scene-loader` exits 0.
+- `.ai/dispatch.verify.ps1` exits 0 and reports `VERIFY OK`.
+
+## Constraints / Non-Goals
+
+- This is a test-only dispatch. Do not change loader implementation, ECS
+  implementation, component definitions, data schemas, golden fixtures,
+  manifests, runtime/editor behavior, build scripts, CI workflows, docs, or
+  Cargo metadata.
+- Do not add dependencies, dev-dependencies, features, workspace members, or
+  lockfile entries.
+- Do not broaden scene-loader behavior, add component support, change ID
+  mapping, add relation/root-entity loading, add transform propagation, or add
+  project-loading production APIs.
+- Do not rewrite or regenerate `golden-projects/**`; tests may read those files
+  only.
+- Do not compensate for a failing regression by changing production source. If
+  the failure proves a source bug that cannot be fixed inside the allowed test
+  files, halt and report it.
+
+## Verification Gates
+
+The Executor MUST run and document the result of each of these in their
+`EXECUTION_REPORT`:
+
+- `cargo test -p rge-scene-loader` -> expected exit 0.
+- `.ai/dispatch.verify.ps1` -> expected exit 0 and `VERIFY OK`.
+- Inspect the final diff and document that changed files are limited to
+  `crates/rge-scene-loader/tests/**`, the executor's own
+  `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-173_EXEC_*.md` report plus optional generated sidecar, and
+  this dispatch's own `ai_dispatch_logs/**` artifact if the queue runner creates
+  one.
+- Inspect the final diff and document that no Cargo files, production source,
+  golden-project files, data/kernel/component crates, editor/runtime files,
+  scripts, workflows, docs, or schemas changed.
+
+## Halt Conditions
+
+The Executor MUST halt without committing and request fresh guidance if any of
+the following occur:
+
+- Satisfying the task appears to require editing anything outside
+  `crates/rge-scene-loader/tests/**` and this dispatch's own allowed
+  handoff/log artifacts.
+- Satisfying the task appears to require modifying `Cargo.toml`, `Cargo.lock`,
+  `crates/rge-scene-loader/src/**`, `crates/rge-data/**`, `kernel/**`,
+  component crates, `golden-projects/**`, editor/runtime code, scripts,
+  workflows, docs, schemas, or any other production source.
+- The `.rge-project` manifest cannot be parsed as `rge_data::Project`, does not
+  contain a scene reference, or the referenced scene cannot be resolved relative
+  to the manifest directory without changing protected files.
+- `load_scene_into_world` fails on the golden scene, omits the expected Camera
+  or KeyLight entities/components, or produces an entity count mismatch that
+  cannot be addressed purely inside tests.
+- `World::advance_tick()` on the loaded world does not increment
+  `current_tick()` by one or does not set `last_tick()` to the prior
+  `current_tick()`.
+- `cargo test -p rge-scene-loader` fails for a reason not directly fixable
+  inside `crates/rge-scene-loader/tests/**`.
+- The canonical `.ai/dispatch.verify.ps1` gate fails for an unrelated
+  pre-existing issue outside the allowed scope; do not broaden the diff to fix
+  unrelated workspace failures.
+- Any forbidden edit or forbidden artifact is created. Stop immediately, do not
+  expand the diff, and report the deviation in the EXEC report.
+
+## Planner Notes
+
+This is a narrow regression on top of the existing scene-loader crate. The
+likely implementation is to extend the existing simple-scene integration test
+helper so it reads `.rge-project` as `rge_data::Project`, resolves the manifest
+scene reference relative to that manifest, parses the scene, imports it through
+`load_scene_into_world`, and then adds the tick assertion on that imported
+world.
+
+The Camera and KeyLight entities may be located by the parsed scene entity
+names (`Camera`, `KeyLight`) or by the canonical IDs already pinned in the
+golden scene, as long as the assertions are made against the entities imported
+into the `World` by the loader.
+
+Under the orchestrator protocol, no `_REVIEW_` or `_CLOSEOUT_` packet is
+expected from this TASK. The only new handoff packet produced by execution
+should be the `ISSUE-173_EXEC_*.md` report, plus its optional generated sidecar
+and the queue runner's own log if applicable.
+
+---
+
+HANDOFF_STATUS: COMPLETE
+NEXT_ROLE: EXECUTOR_AI
+EXIT_CODE: 0
+
+---
